mapper.select: /** EvlIemDao.selectList */ select evl_iem_id , evl_table_id , evl_div_cd , evl_iem_nm , evl_iem_cn , allot_score , evl_stdr_no , sort_ordr_no , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt , row_number() over (order by sort_ordr_no asc) as rn from uspt_evl_iem_nm where evl_table_id = #{evlTableId} and evl_div_cd = #{evlDivCd}
/** EvlIemDao.selectByCmitList */ select a.evl_iem_nm , a.evl_iem_id from uspt_evl_iem_nm a inner join uspt_evl_cmit b on a.evl_table_id = b.evl_table_id where b.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId}

/** EvlIemDao.select */ select evl_iem_id , evl_table_id , evl_div_cd , evl_iem_nm , evl_iem_cn , allot_score , evl_stdr_no , sort_ordr_no , creator_id , created_dt , updater_id , updated_dt from uspt_evl_iem_nm where evl_iem_id = #{evlIemId}
